subagents.title: W2-ST Strategy Architect
subagents.system_instruction: You are a senior Python execution-engine architect. Design robust strategy abstractions and iterative execution loops. Be explicit about async behavior, factory wiring, and backward compatibility.

parsed_output.summary: Implement ExecutionStrategy abstract base class and DagOnceStrategy with an iterative execution loop.

code_changes.purpose: Define strategy abstractions for execution flow management
operations: Add ExecutionStrategy ABC with abstract methods for execution
Implement DagOnceStrategy inheriting from ExecutionStrategy with specific execution logic
Import ExecutionStrategy and DagOnceStrategy to the module namespace

code_changes.purpose: Create iterative execution loop and manage attempt-level events
operations: Implement a class for iterative repair loop integrating with strategies
Add support for handling event logging on each attempt

tests.name: test_execution_strategy_abc
tests.asserts: ExecutionStrategy methods raise NotImplementedError if not overridden

tests.name: test_dag_once_strategy_execution
tests.asserts: DagOnceStrategy executes tasks as defined in its logic

tests.name: test_iterative_repair_loop
tests.asserts: Iterative loop handles execution attempts and logs events correctly

risks: Changing execution logic in DagOnceStrategy may disrupt existing workflows; mitigation involves thorough integration testing.
Async behavior in iterative loops might introduce race conditions; mitigation through careful use of async/await constructs and testing.
acceptance_checks: All new and existing tests pass without failures
Execution strategies are invoked correctly without altering existing behavior

subagents.title: W2-AG Scoring Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a scoring/evaluation systems engineer. Design per-agent scoring schemas and statistically sound reporting bundles. Prioritize deterministic outputs and schema compatibility.

parsed_output.summary: Add agent_scores payload and reliability adjustment to the evaluation server, improving reporting bundle statistics.

code_changes.purpose: Implement agent scores payload and reliability adjustments for reporting.
operations: Add 'agent_scores' to the data payload returned by evaluation functions.
Implement reliability adjustment logic based on evaluation criteria.

code_changes.purpose: Update message contracts to include new agent scores payload.
operations: Modify relevant message structures to accommodate 'agent_scores'.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_in_payload
tests.asserts: Assert that agent_scores are included in the response payload from the evaluation server.

tests.name: test_reliability_adjustment
tests.asserts: Verify that reliability adjustments are correctly applied to the scores based on the defined criteria.

risks: Risk: Introducing a new payload structure could impact existing integrations. Mitigation: Ensure backward compatibility by maintaining existing payload structure in the response when 'agent_scores' is not requested.
acceptance_checks: Verify that both the old and new payload structures return successfully with tests.
Ensure that updated tests pass and confirm the correctness of agent scores and reliability adjustments.

subagents.title: W2-AD Adapter Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are an integration adapter engineer. Design framework adapters with strict contract conformance and graceful optional dependencies.

parsed_output.summary: Add optional import behavior and canonical event mapping for Microsoft Agent Framework integration.

code_changes.purpose: Implement optional import behavior and ensure events are mapped correctly to the canonical format.
operations: Add optional import check for Microsoft agent library.
Implement event mapping function to convert Microsoft events to canonical format.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_optional_import
tests.asserts: Check if the adapter initializes correctly without Microsoft library.

tests.name: test_microsoft_event_mapping
tests.asserts: Validate that Microsoft events are correctly mapped to canonical format.

tests.name: test_microsoft_adapter_integration
tests.asserts: Ensure full integration works when Microsoft library is present.

risks: Possible conflict with existing behavior of integration; mitigation through extensive testing and fallback mechanisms.
acceptance_checks: Verify successful execution of adapter with and without Microsoft library.

key_findings: The implementation addresses the ticket requirements well and correctly outlines the purpose of the code changes.
Tests are well-defined and cover different aspects of the new functionality, ensuring good testability.
Dependencies are appropriately listed, indicating awareness of interactions with related components.
blocking_issues: Risk handling could be improved; strategies for mitigation could be more specific rather than general.
next_actions: Provide more detailed mitigation strategies for risks identified.
Ensure that documentation is updated to reflect the new integration functionality.

subagents.title: W2-UI Engineer
subagents.system_instruction: You are a frontend engineer for React+TypeScript dashboards. Design compatibility-aware UI states and transparent score breakdown UX tied to backend payloads.

parsed_output.summary: Implement dataset selector filters based on workflow compatibility and create a score breakdown panel with detailed criteria information.

code_changes.purpose: Add support for returning datasets based on workflow compatibility
operations: Implement GET /api/eval/datasets?workflow=... endpoint
Integrate filtering logic that disables datasets incompatible with the specified workflow

code_changes.purpose: Create a user interface for the dataset selector that respects workflow compatibility
operations: Fetch datasets from the new API endpoint
Disable incompatible datasets in the UI

code_changes.purpose: Display score breakdown including criteria, weights, grades, and failures
operations: Add state management for displaying criteria scores
Implement UI elements to show weight and grade of each criterion

tests.name: test_WorkflowCompatibleDatasetSelector
tests.asserts: Dataset selector only shows compatible datasets based on workflow

tests.name: test_ScoreBreakdownPanel
tests.asserts: Score breakdown panel shows correct criteria, weights, grades, and failure states

risks: Changes may introduce UI inconsistencies. Mitigation: Implement thorough UI tests.
Existing workflows may break if not all edge cases are considered. Mitigation: Conduct comprehensive regression testing.
acceptance_checks: The dataset selector should display only compatible datasets when a workflow is selected
Score breakdown panel must correctly render all metrics as per the latest specifications

subagents.title: Wave2 QA Reviewer
subagents.focus: Wave 2 end-to-end regression and test coverage
subagents.system_instruction: You are a principal QA reviewer. Identify regression risks, missing tests, and release gates for Wave 2 integration.

parsed_output.summary: Wave 2 integration focuses on enhancing execution strategies, agent scoring, and user interface improvements while ensuring backward compatibility and stable behavior.

code_changes.purpose: Introduce ExecutionStrategy ABC and DagOnceStrategy to enhance strategy management.
operations: Add ExecutionStrategy abstract base class.
Implement DagOnceStrategy for specific evaluation configurations.

code_changes.purpose: Integrate iterative repair loop and attempt-level events to improve workflow processes.
operations: Implement iterative repair logic.
Add events for tracking attempts in the process.

code_changes.purpose: Add agent_scores payload and enhance reporting for reliability adjustments.
operations: Update response payloads to include agent_scores.
Modify reporting logic to adjust for reliability stats.

code_changes.purpose: Add workflow compatibility filters to dataset selector.
operations: Implement GET filters for datasets based on workflow compatibility.

code_changes.purpose: Modify import behavior and adjust event mapping for Microsoft integration.
operations: Make import behavior optional.
Implement canonical event mapping.

tests.name: test_strategy_functionality
tests.asserts: Ensure ExecutionStrategy and DagOnceStrategy work as expected.

tests.name: test_iterative_loop_events
tests.asserts: Verify that iterative repair loop properly tracks attempts.

tests.name: test_agent_scores_reporting
tests.asserts: Check agent_scores payload returns correct statistics.

tests.name: test_dataset_selector_filters
tests.asserts: Validate dataset filters by workflow compatibility function as intended.

tests.name: test_score_breakdown_panel
tests.asserts: Confirm score breakdown panel displays criteria and grades correctly.

tests.name: test_optional_import_behavior
tests.asserts: Ensure optional import behaves correctly under various conditions.

dependencies: W2-ST-001 relies on W2-ST-002 for integrated testing.
W2-AG-001 is dependent on W2-ST-002 for combined functionality.
risks: Risk of breaking existing functionality due to changes in core strategies. Mitigation: Extensive regression testing across affected areas.
Risk of performance degradation with added payloads in API responses. Mitigation: Load testing to assess performance impacts.
acceptance_checks: All new tests must pass with 100% coverage of modified functionalities.
Backward compatibility must be verified through API contract testing.
